question_text: The electromagnetic spectrum is arranged in order of increasing frequency. Which of the following lists four types of electromagnetic radiation in the correct order from lowest to highest frequency?

options.label: A
options.text: Visible light, infrared, microwaves, radio waves

options.label: B
options.text: Radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light

options.label: C
options.text: Microwaves, radio waves, visible light, infrared

options.label: D
options.text: Infrared, visible light, radio waves, microwaves

correct_answer: Radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light
explanation: The electromagnetic spectrum is arranged in order of increasing frequency. Radio waves have the lowest frequency, followed by microwaves, then infrared radiation, and visible light has a higher frequency than infrared. This ordering is a key concept in understanding the properties of different types of electromagnetic radiation.
